Description: If this record should be considered soft deleted; all columns excluding primary keys will be NULL if TRUE
Unique identifier for the problem observation record
Unique identifier for the linked consultation for this problem entry
Identifier of the parent problem, enabling hierarchical grouping of related problems
Date and time when the problem became clinically effective
Date and time when the problem was resolved or ended; NULL if still active
Date and time when the problem was last reviewed by a clinician
Description of the current clinical status of the problem (e.g. 'Active', 'Past', etc.)
EMIS code ID  representing the consultation purpose; used for categorisation
Description of the relationship between this problem and its parent problem
Description of the clinical significance of the problem (e.g. 'Major', 'Minor', etc.)
Expected duration of the problem in days, if recorded
The type of event associated with the problem record
The organisation that this data was replicated from
Date and time the data was made available in the model with a relevant change
Date and time the model last updated this record
